query: What does the Premium Plan include?

reference_facts.fact: Unlimited camera support.
60-day storage history.
Advanced AI detection rules and cellular backup.

query: How much does the Premium Plan cost?

reference_facts.fact: Premium Plan is priced at $19.99 per month or $199.99 when billed annually.

query: What is the annual billing rate for the Premium Plan?

reference_facts.fact: Premium Plan costs $199.99 when billed annually.

query: How much is the Plus Plan per month?

reference_facts.fact: Plus Plan is $4.99 per month.

query: What are your prices?

reference_facts.fact: Plus Plan is $4.99 per month or $49.99 annually.
Premium Plan is $19.99 per month or $199.99 when billed annually.

query: How much does it cost annually?

reference_facts.fact: Plus Plan is $49.99 annually.
Premium Plan is $199.99 when billed annually.

query: How long does standard shipping take?

reference_facts.fact: Standard Ground Shipping delivery takes 3 to 5 business days.

query: What is the delivery time for express shipping?

reference_facts.fact: Express Shipping delivery takes 1 to 2 business days.

query: Is standard shipping free?

reference_facts.fact: Standard Ground Shipping is free for orders totaling $50 or more.
A flat rate of $5.99 applies for standard shipping on orders under $50.

query: Do you ship internationally?

reference_facts.fact: TechMart ships internationally to over 50 countries.

query: What time do I need to order for same-day dispatch?

reference_facts.fact: Orders placed before 2:00 PM CST are dispatched on the same business day.

query: What is your refund policy?

reference_facts.fact: Refund window is within 45 days from original purchase date.

query: How long does it take to get a refund?

reference_facts.fact: Standard refund processing time is 7 to 10 business days.

query: How many days for refund processing?

reference_facts.fact: Refund processing time is 7 to 10 business days.

query: What condition must returned items be in to get a refund?

reference_facts.fact: Product must be in its original packaging, include all accessories, and be free from visible physical damage.

query: What is the return window if I miss the refund deadline?

reference_facts.fact: Return products within 90 days of purchase for store credit or exchange.

query: Is there a restocking fee for open-box returns?

reference_facts.fact: Returns of open-box items or items showing minor wear are subject to a 15% restocking fee.

query: How do I get an RMA number for a return?

reference_facts.fact: RMA number can be generated online through your TechMart Account Dashboard.

query: How long is the standard warranty on devices?

reference_facts.fact: Protected by a standard 2-Year Limited Manufacturer Warranty.

query: How many extra years of coverage does the Extended Warranty Plan add?

reference_facts.fact: Extended Warranty Plan extends coverage by an additional 3 years.

query: Does the Wave Headset support active noise cancellation?

reference_facts.fact: TechMart Wave Headset features active noise cancellation (ANC).

query: What is the battery playback time of the wireless Wave Headset?

reference_facts.fact: Supports up to 30 hours of continuous battery playback.

query: Are smart hubs required for wireless cameras?

reference_facts.fact: All TechMart smart cameras connect directly to Wi-Fi without requiring a physical hub.

query: My smart camera keeps going offline, what should I check?

reference_facts.fact: Ensure the camera is within 30 feet of your router.
Concrete walls and metal doors can degrade signals.

query: Does the Smart Camera Pro support 5GHz Wi-Fi networks during setup?

reference_facts.fact: TechMart smart cameras require a 2.4GHz Wi-Fi band for setup and cannot connect to 5GHz-only networks.

query: How do I turn on the Wave Headset?

reference_facts.fact: Hold the circular button on the side of your Wave Headset for 3 seconds to power on/off.

query: How long before the password reset link expires?

reference_facts.fact: Password reset links expire exactly after 15 minutes.

query: What domain should I whitelist if I do not receive my reset password email?

reference_facts.fact: Whitelist our domain @techmart.com inside your email client settings.

query: How do I request a formal review of my complaint by the Support Manager?

reference_facts.fact: Request formal review by the Support Manager by writing directly to manager-support@techmart.com.

query: When can I request escalation to a Support Supervisor?

reference_facts.fact: If unresolved after 48 hours, request route to Team Lead.
If still unresolved after an additional 24 hours, request to speak with a Support Supervisor.
